name: Chicken Caesar Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 Skinned and boned chicken breasts, thinly sliced
10 oz. package frozen sugar snap peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chicken in 3 tbsp. Caesar dressing in a large skillet for 4 to 5 minutes, or until almost done.
2. Add green onions, peas, and carrot; cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 5 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
3. Add spinach; cook, stirring occasionally, for 1 to 2 minutes, or until wilted.
4. Toss with pasta and serve with remaining Caesar dressing. Yield: 2 to 3 servings.
